commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2ba417d873b180daa9a540516d77789c91ccc302)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an age-only fallback to `pruneDiagnosticSessionStates()` so entries older than the diagnostic session TTL are deleted regardless of state or queue depth.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: failed recovery outcomes can return before mutating diagnostic state, while current pruning only deletes idle empty entries. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review should choose the recovery-aware canonical fix among the linked PRs and require real behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair takeover.

target.title: fix(logging): prune non-idle stale diagnostic session entries
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
